title: SevenTec
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d10bb0e0f2944ef78bbfc5166b88b1ad6d3b128e.png)
**Pack Version** (Last)**:** v1.1

**Created by:** 
> Me ( [@GalacticUniv](https://discord.gg/72dHTWJr6R) )

**Available in the following versions:**
> 1.12.2 | 1.16 - 1.20.1 | 1.20.2+

**Tags**: 
> Custom, Service, Custom Color, 16x, Mettalic

**Description:**
> SevenTec is a special texture pack because it was the first one I made upon request. In this case, it was created as one of the rewards for boosting the server. While it may seem like a fairly simple pack, it has a unique charm.

> With a soft purple hue leaning towards white, it gives the textures a clean and appealing look. Perfect for those who want something simple yet visually beautiful!

> This texture pack is Diamond Only, but you can download the Netherite version right here!

> Don't forget that downloading the texture pack from the official sources (In PlanetMinecraft) is a huge way to support us! <3

> If you have any questions or want to report a bug, feel free to do so through our official Discord:
> <https://discord.gg/72dHTWJr6R>

> You can also follow us on social media! :D
> <https://solo.to/galacticuniv> 


![Compatible with](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/960c76ddd8a7ab7c7e79ad788f87bc2899f76960_0.webp)

- You can download Fabric Sky Boxes here: [Download Fabric Sky Boxes (Modrinth)](<https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes>)
